_meta.purpose: Anchored seed ratings (Glicko-2 prior mean) for new ELO entrants. Use these instead of the default 1500/350/0.06 when a model has a published proof/code benchmark.

schema.rd: Glicko-2 rating deviation (350 = fully uninformed; we use 100-200 for benchmark-anchored seeds).
schema.provenance: Source benchmarks + cross-checks justifying the rating.

_meta.consumer: scripts/elo/glicko2.py --seed-ratings scripts/elo/anchored_seed_ratings.json (optional; falls back to defaults if unspecified).
_meta.calibration_note: Ratings derived from R20 live Glicko-2 (3-judge median where available) + ADR-0052 extrapolations from public benchmarks (SWE-bench, Terminal-Bench, AlphaProof, Aider Polyglot). Cross-checked against R20 archive scripts/elo/example_runs/2026-05-27-h/ratings.json.
_meta.update_policy: Refresh anytime a new entrant has > 30 games AND the live Glicko-2 rating differs from this prior by > 100 points.

provenance: Estimate -70 vs @high based on gen_sample.py PLAYERS extrapolation
No live games yet; widened RD = 200
Short-prompt ceiling effect favours sonnet in R18-R20 evaluations (terse case-cluster)
Estimate -70 vs sonnet-4.6 based on Anthropic generational delta
Consistently lenient as a judge (kappa=0.537 vs opus, R19 drift audit)
Used as 3rd judge in R19 5-judge calibration; estimate -110 vs opus-4.7-high based on per-case scoring agreement (Pearson r ≈ 0.7)
Sandbox quirk: cannot read/write /tmp paths — needs inline payload
ADR-0052 extrapolation: GPT-5 family mini variants score 75-85% of full-size on code benchmarks
Codex variant typically +30-50 over base on code-heavy benchmarks (HumanEval, SWE-bench)
Used in gen_sample.py PLAYERS at 1490 — that value is the synthetic-prototype upper bound; live games will likely show lower
